LanguageData.EM_PioneerSpine_OverclockHarmony.label: overclock frontier sync
LanguageData.EM_PioneerSpine_OverclockHarmony.descrip:
When the built-in neural overclock package is active, this spine routes the burst window into steadier movement, target transitions, and sustained labor cadence control.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.EM_PioneerSpine.label: pioneer lattice spine
LanguageData.EM_PioneerSpine.description:
This spine keeps pioneer industry and resilience active at all times and grants neural overclock directly. Linked effects branch by state: vanguard fire in ranged combat, settler throughput while undrafted, last stand below 40% health in combat, and overclock harmony whenever neural overclock is active.
-- easyrim
